instruction: The user icon is purple. Reset it to its standard black color.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="user" data-source="heroicons/outline/user.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #a855f7" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 6a3.75 3.75 0 1 1-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 0 1 7.5 0ZM4.501 20.118a7.5 7.5 0 0 1 14.998 0A17.933 17.933 0 0 1 12 21.75c-2.676 0-5.216-.584-7.499-1.632Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
